raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What matters now","name":"What feels most important to get into today, Sarah?","description":"Lets Sarah set the agenda before the manager narrows in on specific concerns.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Impact in practice","name":"Can you walk me through one decision from the last quarter where your work changed an outcome?","description":"Surfaces a concrete example of leverage rather than general claims of contribution.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stakeholder traction","name":"Where did you have the most traction with stakeholders this quarter?","description":"Tests whether she is proactively building influence, not just producing solid analysis.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Visibility habits","name":"How are you deciding when to raise signal before the work is finished?","description":"Checks whether she is surfacing progress and risk early enough for others to act.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Cross-functional friction","name":"Where does cross-functional friction slow you down most?","description":"Finds the specific situations where she may be choosing execution over alignment.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoff pattern","name":"What do you usually trade off first when pressure rises?","description":"Surfaces her default judgment under pressure and what gets sacrificed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Escalation trigger","name":"What makes you decide to escalate versus keep pushing on your own?","description":"Reveals her threshold for broadening visibility instead of staying in execution mode.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Senior bar","name":"What does strong Senior-level impact look like to you in this role?","description":"Tests whether she has a clear internal model of the performance bar at her level.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Signal plan","name":"What would you change in how you update stakeholders over the next month?","description":"Forces a practical plan for raising visibility and making progress legible.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"Given what we've covered, what do you want to do differently in the next two weeks?","description":"Closes on a concrete behavior change and near-term commitment.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
